query:
UPDATE whatsappConfig 
SET templateNewOrder = CONCAT('Olá *{{customerName}}*! 👋🏻 {{greeting}}, Tudo bem?\n\n', templateNewOrder)
WHERE establishmentId = 30001 
AND templateNewOrder NOT LIKE '%{{customerName}}%';
